3180550.name: The Funnel - Demo
3180550.description:
This demo covers the first narrative act and first central minigame of The Funnel. Meet your crew mates, build gear boxes, and delve into the beginning of The Funnel's mysteries as this underground steampunk world begins to crack.

While the demo is representative of the final game, details and mechanics are still subject to change. Therefore, it is not guaranteed that saves will be transferable.

Who do you trust

Choose who to work with or who to betray. Every crew mate you meet has their own plan for the future of the factory. In this demo, earn a crew mate's trust and learn the beginning of their plans.

Minigames are choices

Just like your dialogue choices, succeeding or failing in a minigame will change the outcome of your story. If someone asks you to attach a timer to a bomb and you fail, that character might sacrifice themselves since the bomb no longer has a delay.

Discover the mysteries that underpin this strange world

Why were you transferred here? What does the Funnel want with you? Experience the start of The Funnel's mysteries and begin your search for answers.
3180550.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
